programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Hartford, CT to Elks Lodge, the oldest and largest secret fraternal organizations in the country. Elks Lodge #19 is shrouded in mystery and tragedy with a gruesome death hanging over its head....and decades of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: TAPS gets into the spirit with an investigation of Bethlehem, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roller Ghoster
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS heads to Ohio to investigate Kings Island, anamusement park that sits on land that was thesite of an awful accident.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Naples, New York, to investigate the Naples Hotel.This hotel was built in 1895.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Flooded Souls
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Hales Bar Dam and Marina in Tennessee, to investigate a dam that was built on Native American land.

programme.title: Moesha: Job
programme.desc: Moesha gets her first taste of independence when she gets a job and earns her own money.

programme.title: Moesha: Niece
programme.desc: Moesha learns to appreciate Dee and see her in a new light with the help of Dee’s visiting niece Charisse.

programme.title: Moesha: The Ditch Party
programme.desc: Moesha reports on the annual school “ditch day”, but will not reveal who attended or who her sources are.

programme.title: Moesha: Mentor
programme.desc: Moesha is sentenced to do errands for an old woman who lives down the block because she stole oranges from her tree.

programme.title: Moesha: Hakeem’s New Flame
programme.desc: Hakeem gets a girlfriend, making both Kim and (surprisingly) Moesha jealous. They conspire to break up the romance, resulting in a heart broken Hakeem.

programme.title: Moesha: Baby Love
programme.desc: Frank and Dee announce they want to have a child of their own, surprising Moesha and causing Miles to run away.

programme.title: Moesha: Women Are From Mars Men Are From Saturn
programme.desc: Moesha is off visiting cousins out of town. Meanwhile, Dee thinks Frank is spending too much time with “the boys” including his brother Bernie.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Fast Track Episode, Part II
programme.desc: Mona has trouble getting producers to judge the Delicious Talent contest that she is overseeing and Dee Dee loses the position she thought she had at her law firm.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Undercover Episode
programme.desc: After Mona discovers Dee Dee has secretly gotten back together with her older exboyfriend Carter, she is disappointed that Dee Dee didn’t trust her enough to tell her.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Doormat No More Episode
programme.desc: After telling Mona not to let people take advantage of her, Dee Dee later regrets giving her that advice when she asks Mona a favor and is turned down.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the Most Haunted team's investigation at the now-abandoned old police station and courts in Accrington. With the team splitting up to cover as much space as they can, something seems to be stalking them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT3
programme.desc: The third and final part of this terrifying and intriguing investigation into the paranormal activity at Accrington’s Old Police Station and Courts.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding is back with the first part of a brand-new episode of Most Haunted. The intrepid ghost hunter has taken her team to the historic hall, which is said to be haunted by ancestral ghosts, the apparition of a white lady and a demon dog.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt2

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carnies & Armories
programme.desc: A tough group of bidders team up to take down Ton and Allen at auction. After a couple of wins, the guys try to sell an arsenal used by Native Americans and some vintage carnival gear. But will they get conned?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington

programme.title: Auction Hunters: It's Raining Ton
programme.desc: The guys take Big Sis to her first auction - and when things get ugly, she becomes their secret weapon. Ton tests out a "blob" and Allen gets shot with a riot gun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Trading Places

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A community bands together to search for a missing woman. The police are unable to solve the case, until they speak to her husband's close friend and learn some startling information.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives have a brutal case on their hands when a beloved community member is killed and a part of his body is apparently taken as a souvenir by the murderer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Kelly Cochran

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Mahmuda Khatun
programme.desc: Amin Miah wanted a devout, homely wife to start a family with. Mahmuda Khatun wanted a career, a social life - and her family off her back. Their differences were irreconcilable, and one of them would choose the violent way out.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Thomas Infante
programme.desc: Lisa and Thomas Infante were childhood sweethearts who grew up on the same street. It seemed inevitable they would end up together. But their marriage was volatile, and when one of them found love elsewhere, the consequences would be fatal.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Malcolm Webster
programme.desc: The women in Malcolm Webster’s life seemed prone to bad luck. One died in a car crash. Another suffered a mysterious illness. A third, a keen sailor, found her life jacket punctured. How long before police realised this was more than coincidence?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Stephen Searle
programme.desc: Stephen and Anne Searle were the grandparents at the helm of a large, close-knit family. But Stephen was having an affair, and Anne had been pushed to drink by her husband’s controlling behaviour. Neither was destined to enjoy a peaceful retirement.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Cat and Mouse

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Married To Madness
programme.desc: When Susan Zarriello's ex-husband David unleashes a sadistic torrent of cyber attacks 15 years after their divorce, Susan realizes he's been watching her for years.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground, Hogan causes a marital tiff, which, to fix, requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: While awaiting word to complete a sabotage mission, Stalag 13 gets a new officer under Klink - Burkhalter's alert brother-in-law, who enjoys tormenting prisoners.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Hochstetter works to lower a French pilot's resistance to interrogation, Hogan brings the man's fiancee to camp to have Klink marry them.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogan's set-up at Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan enlists an attractive agent's help in blackmailing Gen. Burkhalter so Klink won't be punished for the destruction of a newly built radio tower.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: To improve the camp's inspection rating, Klink transfers in a stern German sergeant who quickly makes life miserable for staff and prisoners alike with his overly strict and unwavering adherence to all regulations. All want him gone.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Allies give Hogan a solo mission: attend a baron's party as Commandant Klink. Burkhalter gets involved when he learns that Klink's name sits at the very top of the guest list.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Do Unto Others

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Last year, Judy says her husband of 30 years, Danny, suffered a mid-life crisis, had an affair and filed for divorce -- but now he wants her back. What advice does Dr. Phil give the couple?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jon says he hates his selfish, untrustworthy dad, Jim, who works the holidays as Santa Claus! Then, pro-trainer Greg thinks he's on the show to talk health. Troy Dunn surprises him with his long-lost son! And 14-yr-old singing sensation Jackie Evancho!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee's husband, Kirby, made headlines after she videotaped him spanking her with a wooden spoon. What made Renee decide to record it and turn Kirby in to police? Is there any chance of saving this marriage? Plus, updates on some memorable former guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jordan Bleimeyer, 5, was found severely malnourished locked inside a small closet under the stairs of a Houston home. His father, Bradley & stepmother, Tammi, were charged with felony child endangerment. Windy Hall, Jordan's bio mom talks to Dr. Phil.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Waco & Alley left their home state with their 3-year-old child, missing a custody hearing, & have no idea the court then granted guardianship to Waco's parents. Tensions run high when Dr. Phil reveals to Waco & Alley they lost custody of their child!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: We've all heard the saying, "Don't get mad, get even," but after watching this show, you may think twice before seeking vindication! You won't believe the twists and turns in this story of revenge with Deoborah and Todd! Pt. 2

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 3

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tiff Needell heads to LA to check out the latest car trend to take the USA – restomodding. It's the art of sympathetically restoring classic cars to modern standards, while retaining their original charm – and Tiff's behind the wheel of LA's best examples

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell host a battle of the best cheap hot hatches on sale. The Ford Fiesta ST, RenaultSport Clio and Peugeot 208 GTI are all thrashed to the limit before Tiff and Jason reveal the champion.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell is joined by German petrolhead legend and Queen of the Nurburgring Sabine Schmitz. They're finding the ultimate machine for thrill seekers, pitting the latest Caterham 7 against its hardcore rivals from Morgan and Ariel.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato celebrate the 100th anniversary of Aston Martin. Jason drives James Bond's DB5 from Skyfall and learns from the the master craftsmen at the company's heritage centre, while Tiff tests the brand new Rapide S four door supercar

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is in Sweden testing the brand new Volvo S60 Polestar super saloon against its racing car cousin – the competition car of double Swedish Touring Car Champion Fredrick Ekblom.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1997, an extraordinary event occurred across the state of Arizona that has become the subject of great debate in the UFO community.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the supposed mastermind behind the 9/11 terrorist attacks and leader of the Al Qaeda terrorist cell remained a CIA asset until his death.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the founders of Architects and Engineers for 911 Truth and Firefighters for 911 Truth who present their case that the WTC towers were brought down by controlled demolition on 9/11.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The religious practice known as exorcism is examined as well as claims of demonic possession. Richard travels to a Catholic seminary in Yonkers, New York.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Global Warming, A Hoax?
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several journalists and researchers who argue the theory that human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Bardo Museum, Tunisia
programme.desc: From the real lives of gladiators to the connection between Star Wars and Tunisia, discover the secrets inside the Bardo Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Plays The Blues/Buster's Sweet Success

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Monte Cassino (September 3, 1943)

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Gilbert Islands (November 1943)
programme.desc: Bloody fighting erupts on a group of tiny Pacific islands in November 1943.

programme.desc: Allied armies encounter German resistance in the Italian fishing town of Anzio.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Kwajalein

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle in Palau (Summer 1944)

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: D-Day (June 6,1944)

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Retaking France

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Operation Dragoon (August 1944)
programme.desc: The Allies break into France and push the Germans back to their own border.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Liberation of the Paris

programme.desc: This episode includes: Burbank Robbers, BC Sea Monster, Vision Quest, Florida Film Flam and Thumper.

programme.title: Airline Disaster: Crash of the Century
programme.desc: This film reconstructs the moments leading up to the tragedy of an airline disaster.

programme.title: Johnny Strange: Born to Fly
programme.desc: Follow the life and tragic death of 23-year-old Johnny Strange, the youngest person ever to summit Everest.

programme.title: Shockwave
programme.desc: A powerful earthquake and tsunami will some day devastate the Pacific Northwest. What can we do to prepare?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crack
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Awakening
programme.desc: The massive Tidalwave joins the Decepticons, but is, seemingly, defeated in battle by Hot Shot and Blurr. Alexis discovers three new minicons, which Sideways says combine to create another ultimate weapon, the Requiem Blaster.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In Naroom's forest, the kids are heading toward a giant obelisk, a structure which the Book of Elders says contains the Naroomi Dreamstone. On route, our trio are packing up camp when Tony starts having seeing things from his Earth life.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: During a race at the floating Neptune Islands, the team encounters a squadron of old bomber jets that disappear in front of their eyes. The local urban legend says they are a ghostly squadron of jets that are trying to find their way home.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Union
programme.desc: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without. Red Alert and the kids use the portal to travel to Unicron's core.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor plans to flatten Megalopolis with a massive, 60-story tall rock, but he suddenly has no one to help him push the rock down his mountain. His normally-subservient army of Links has run off in disgust over being fed the wrong meal at lunchtime.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Ring the Bell
programme.desc: Gore grapples with Varis as he looks to drop the hammer on the Hanoi!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Watching a seasoned Magi named Ranger Dex acquire the animite of a wild Dream Creature, Tony learns more about why he was brought to the Moonlands. He also gains a valuable piece of knowledge: where the first Dreamstone is located.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: With his new time machine, Piranoid hopes to get rid of the Sharks. He sends Streex back to Jurassic times and Jab to Atlantis.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: When an astronaut/scientist discovers an alien embryo in a strange alien pod, he asks the celebrated Dr. Piranoid to come up to the space station to examine it -- not knowing that Piranoid plans to gene-slam Manta-ray DNA with alien DNA.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Base
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop get into a debate of which is better: the sun or the wind. Rachel learns that the park is not only a place to come and play but it's also the home of many different creatures.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles to the Second Power
programme.desc: Dregg and his crew plan an invasion of Earth to make it his new home base, but first he has to get his transporter chip back from Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Day the Earth Disappeared
programme.desc: With the city breaking apart, the Turtles head to the street to investigate and see the Dreggnaut appear in the sky. With Mung's help, Dregg reprograms the transporter to open a warp in space.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Lord Dregg launches a final attack on the Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Tracks
programme.desc: April O'Neil, ace reporter for Channel 6, investigates recent break-ins, allegedly by Ninjas, which have resulted in the thefts of numerous technologies.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Shredder
programme.desc: The Shredder kidnaps Splinter in an attempt to lure the Turtles to his own cause. In order to rescue Splinter the Turtles must enter the Shredder's mobile fortress and brave its dangerous weaponry.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Thing about Rats
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman, a mad scientist, is showing an exterminator his new invention: a rat catching robot called Mousers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder experiments with the Inter-Dimensional Portal, hoping to contact Krang's' Rock Soldiers and prepare an invasion of Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder & Splintered
programme.desc: Shredder lures Splinter into the Technodrome, this time with the promise that a weapon in his possession can restore the sensei to human form.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Shredder
programme.desc: Shredder trains students at the Dojo for a crooked Turtles gang. The mock turtles' crime spree starts turning the public against Michelangelo, Raphael, Donatello and Leonardo.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Incredible Shrinking Turtles
programme.desc: In the first of a four-parter, the amazing amphibians search for the segments of the powerful crystal Eye of Sarnoth. Shredder cuts the Turtles down to size, literally.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Provoked by Team Rocket, hordes of Rock-type Pokémon attack our heroes on their way to the Battle Arena!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Ash and friends fall into a trap set by a man who wants to catch a Jigglypuff for his daughter's birthday!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: May and her rival Drew go after the same Arcanine, both hoping to catch it for their next Contest!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Ash and friends rescue a sad Psyduck from a group of Fighting types, but they can't figure out how to cheer it up…

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Our heroes and Team Rocket check out a new restaurant owned by two sisters who can't stop squabbling!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: After a scientific experiment goes awry, Ash and friends try to track down a Caterpie that has grown to enormous proportions!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa. The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Laa-Laa's ball. The Teletubbies watch some children rolling things up…and down a hill. Po starts all the other Teletubbies rolling through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two girls make a picture of a gold fish pond using tissue paper. Dipsy sees a cloud and decides to follow it. The cloud rains and leaves a puddle.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy leaves his hat behind, but when he comes to find it. The Noo-noo has tidied up. The Teletubbies watch some children style their friend Rosie’s hair.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies sit down to eat some Tubby Custard, but they stop to watch some children buy some different sorts of vegetables. The Teletubbies ask the question – what colour is Tubby Custard?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children perform a Maori Song. In Teletubbyland, Po sings a lovely song. Gradually the other Teletubbies join in, until they sing a lovely song together. The Teletubbies love to sing.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children wearing their boots and playing in the garden. A pair of boots appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children mixing water, paint and washing up liquid to make bubble pictures. Po shows us how to make Tubby Custard before running off to watch three ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.desc: Factory opGons offered drivers the comforts of home. While the cupholder was a home run, there were plenty of head-scratchers, from record players to dashboard coffee pots.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers
programme.desc: In the 1980s, Hasbro needed a hit toy line. Transforming robots were hot in Japan, but to succeed in the U.S., they needed a backstory. Enter Marvel Comics!

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers
programme.desc: Transformers explodes in popularity, but Hasbro sidelines Marvel Comics and kills Optimus Prime to launch new toys—a gamble that could redefine the franchise for better or worse.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers
programme.desc: By the 2000s, Transformers is on fumes but Steven Spielberg sees big-screen potential, tapping Michael Bay—who isn’t convinced this 80s toy can become a new millennial movie.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Cairo, Egypt and then Amsterdam. They must beat rival relic hunter Avery Ko to the Pharaoh Thutmose's diamond before it is cut up and sold.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Stewie Harper head to Stockholm, Sweden to find the Runestone of King Jann I of Norway.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to France to look for the lost wedding vows of Josephine Pontoise and Guy de Bourdin, which would prove their heir is the rightful owner of St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to France to find the lost stones from Marie Antoinette's Crown.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Yung-Hu, a lovesick goblin, falls for a married woman, I-Ling. The pilgrims teach them about love, faith, and the path toward enlightenment.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: As the pilgrims sleep, the Illiterate Vampire tries to bite Tripitaka. When discovered, he’s chased away—learning that even ignorance can be redeemed.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A kind monster disguises himself as a puppy to win friends, but villagers fear him. The pilgrims teach him that goodness doesn’t need disguise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The group meets four sorcerers impersonating them. Monkey and his friends expose the fakes, proving that virtue and truth cannot be copied.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims visit a village where a sacred screen depicts Goddess Sorosvati and the Gods of Fortune. Magic within the painting traps their souls.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a land ruled by a wasp witch who kidnaps children, the pilgrims fight to restore families and break the witch’s curse of sorrow.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A rabbi's (David Opatoshu) 13-year-old grandson joins a group of black teens to search for an ancient, stolen Torah.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: An ambitious TV commentator (Mort Sahl) is determined to prove the guilt of a widow (Dana Wynter) exonerated by a jury.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A member (David Cassidy) of Mark's neighborhood basketball team is trapped in a mob boss's robbery ring.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A produce merchant (Ann Doran) refuses to sell her business to a mob-backed combine.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Mark's kindness to a hitchhiker (Tina Louise) gets him involved with three gunmen who robbed a poker club.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A Samoan boxer (Patrick Adiarte) suffers physical and emotional abuse at the hands of his relatives when he decides to quit the ring.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Hotline
programme.desc: After three women are found strangled, Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate whether or not there is a connection between the attacks and an erotic hotline. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are assigned by Internal Affairs to check out a security leak among the 14th Precinct's personnel, forcing the duo to reluctantly spy on their colleagues. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Mr. Lonelyhearts
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are called in when an elderly man comes looking for his wife. But a simple missing persons case soon turns into a major bigamy and fraud case. All the while Cagney deals with a suitor.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Conduct Unbecoming
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) team together with another detective, Charles Stephens (guest star Christopher Allport), to investigate an illegal handgun operation. However, their investigation is impeded by Charles's suspension.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: I'll Be Home For Christmas
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are looking forward to an early release on Christmas Eve when a man dressed as Santa Claus (guest star Richard Masur), who has been arrested for charity fraud, escapes from his cell in the 14th precinct.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organization: the Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Bad Trip
programme.desc: On August 20, 2001, Charles Tremblay, 15, was beaten, then thrown into the St-Charles River where he drowned. Tremblay's body was discovered in the mud less than 24 hours after his death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: After finding the body of a young girl in a stream located in the suburbs of Montreal, investigators strive to retrace a murderer who knew how to use water to his advantage.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Killers
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Killing Time
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives: True Crime
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip

programme.title: The New Detectives: Vanished

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead On Target

programme.desc: Floyd wants to do the show but Jon’s is the scheduled guest.

programme.desc: Garfield tells of when an exterminator and his cat are sent to the Doctor’s home.

programme.desc: When Jon is set-up for humiliation by a dating game TV show, Garfield comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield tells Odie about the stage team of Jackie and his cat Buddy.

programme.title: On the Case: No Exit

programme.title: On the Case: A Stranger Among Us

programme.title: On the Case: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing

programme.title: On the Case: Terrifying Calls

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in Disguise
programme.desc: Police race to track down the unlikely killer responsible for three terrifying murders.

programme.desc: Bludgeoned to death whilst walking down a country lane, the horrific murders of Lin and Megan Russell made worldwide news. Discover the events of that shocking day.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs
programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Murder By Mail: Keith Cottingham
programme.desc: In 1984 a parcel bomb was sent to a 53-year-old grandmother living in a tranquil English village. She died of horrific injuries. No one understood why it had happened. The only evidence detectives had was the bomb itself.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A missing woman is found dead in Texas; interviews with her family, friends, investigators, and boyfriend.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Whether a true crime television show influenced the investigation of an alleged rape and murder case in Atlanta.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of a woman's husband reveals he is not the first man she married who died under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The investigation into the shooting death of retired NYPD officer Patrick Gilhuley, including interviews with jury members and a deconstruction of forensic evidence.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A New York dentist denies killing his lover's husband -- who was also his best friend.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear

programme.desc: Oscar and Felix run a heated campaign for President of their building's tenants' association, but Oscar doesn't fully realize everything the position entails.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang's relationships are thrown out of whack when Holly discovers there's way more to Stuart than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Good Cop, Bad Cop Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Mr. Almost Episode
programme.desc: Nick runs into an old college friend, who convinces him to bring Deion Sanders aboard his energy drink business – with humiliating consequences.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: A rural Utah town located in the Rocky Mountains experiences a nightmarish Christmas when a woman is found brutally stabbed to death; due to the wintry weather, detectives have their hands full as they search for her killer.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: The condition of a mummified body that is found in the arid farmlands of Solano County, Calif., in 1996 leaves it unidentified for over 10 years, but when a cold case is reexamined, a startling connection is made.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: DJ Steven B. Williams mysteriously disappears off the coast of California, and once police begin their search, they soon learn this is no ordinary missing persons case, as a multi-million dollar inheritance has also vanished.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: When a mother of three vanishes after a 1986 blizzard, Connecticut police are led to a chilling theory when the trail of evidence brings them to the shores of an icy lake.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.desc: When barman David Morley was beaten to death on London's South Bank, lead detective Nick Scola deduced that the attack was not what it first appeared to be.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lust

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Drost Notthoff Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case
programme.desc: On March 28th 2013, the burnt body of Anne Barbot, 38 years old, is discovered in a forest of Maine-et-Loire.

programme.title: The Case: Serial Rapist (Guy Bertrand)

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The decomposing body of a little girl is found in the Arizona desert. Detectives are unable to identify her, so the local community lays her to rest with the name 'Little Miss Nobody'.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1981, the body of Sylvia Quayle is discovered by her distraught father in her Cherry Hills home. It turns out that she had been shot, stabbed and sexually assaulted, resulting in her death.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A young woman is last seen alive hitchhiking on Valentine's Day. The next day her body is discovered along a deserted road. It appeared as though she had been strangled to death with a bikini top.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads her team in a two-part investigation at the foreboding Gloucester Prison, one of Britain's most haunted places, known for its history of death, fear, pain, suicide, and incarceration

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation of the imposing and abandoned Gloucester Prison.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt3
programme.desc: The third part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation into the very haunted and abandoned Gloucester Prison. With the team splitting up the activity rises and something is trying to stop Yvette and Glen.

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads team in a violent, secret investigation. Place's name and location concealed due to extreme haunting. Little history, aggressive entities a mystery. Can they reveal the darkness and face the unknown?

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Town
programme.desc: IMF leader Jim Phelps is marked for murder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killing
programme.desc: The IMF sets out to destroy a murder-for-hire organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Phoenix
programme.desc: The IMF foils the attempts of a once-powerful communist to regain power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trial By Fury
programme.desc: The IMF goes to the aid of a friendly South American government which has been overthrown by revolutionaries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Recovery
programme.desc: The IMF takes the task of recovering a secret fail-safe device.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hall of Fame Game
programme.desc: Allen heads to an auction with Elle, while Ton and Big Sis revamp the shop to help bring in more customers. Allen unearths a Ouija board and a set of antique basketballs, and goes toe-to-toe with an NBA Hall of Famer.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Party Gras
programme.desc: On a trip to New Orleans, Ton and Allen look to mix business with pleasure. They wage war with some locals at a tough auction, win a Mardi Gras unit that contains a confetti blaster and a modern calliope, then hit the town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Tough as Nails
programme.desc: CJ seeks to disrupt Allen's search for serenity at a storage auction before the guy's head to a live auction to buy and sell. They uncover an unusual Marilyn Monroe statue, an industrial slip n' slide, and a bed of nails.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn
programme.desc: On the brink of a major decision, Ton and Allen face-off with Carolyn at an auction in Covina. They win a "special effects unit" that contains big machines for crazy stunt work. The guys decide the fate of the shop.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Creatures From Hell
programme.desc: Share the terror of women and children who are stalked by fiendish beings.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Evil Intentions
programme.desc: Visit a haunted tattoo shop and witness a supernatural family reunion.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Bringing Ghosts In
programme.desc: Learn what happens when ghosts from eras past cross into our realm.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Terrifying Visions
programme.desc: Meet a teen attacked by a ghost, and another who contacts a paranormal being.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil
programme.desc: Hear from terrified people who wish their sixth sense wasn’t quite so good.

programme.title: A Haunting: Spirits of the Dead
programme.desc: The Whitley’s buy a farmhouse that houses a negative presence. The presence turns physical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Shape Of Evil
programme.desc: Jay Yaple persuades his wife that Enfield, CT, is the perfect place for them. After a series of unexplained events, Jay discovers the house has a dark history of mysterious deaths. Anyone who attempts to come to their aid is driven away by the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: Masks Of Terror
programme.desc: Jeanette Osborne treats herself to a set of Haitian masks to decorate her California dream home. But shortly after, strange activity leads her to conclude that the masks are to blame.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Attic
programme.desc: A series of photographs show what you cannot see with the naked eye: an evil face in the attic.

programme.title: A Haunting: Stalked by Evil
programme.desc: A shadowy presence manifests from the darkened corners of Judy McCarthy’s Texas home.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Almost a decade after Californian student Lynsie Ekelund went missing, detectives call the main suspect's bluff when they find human remains at the construction site he worked at.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother-of-two mysteriously disappears after spending the night at a local New Mexico bar. The police race against the clock to hopefully find her alive, and are shocked by what they uncover.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Sean Vincent Gillis from Louisiana was arrested on suspicion of killing five women, but during police questioning, he ultimately confessed to the brutal murders of three more people.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect. A risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives grill the wife of a man found shot dead on his Iowa farm after they discover she had an affair with one of his friends. Can they pressurise the pair to tell the truth?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Puppet Master
programme.desc: Christy Martin is the toughest female boxer in the world. But outside the ring, Christy deals with the fight of her life as she's blackmailed and abused by her husband...who is also her coach.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Ties that Blind

programme.title: 72 Hours: Double Cross
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of a shady Montreal businessman takes detectives into the lurid underworld of drug dealers, con men, and crooked lawyers.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hijacked

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Global Warming, A Hoax?
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several journalists and researchers who argue the theory that human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Secret: Evidence We Are Not Alone
programme.desc: This story and the trail of scientific discovery that followed proves that the official US government position on UFOs has been, and still is, a carefully orchestrated deception designed to hide the most extraordinary secret in recorded history.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Silent Revolution of Truth
programme.desc: The award-winning film documents the amazing, true-life adventures of Billy Meier, the only proven UFO contactee.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: THE MYSTERY AND CULTS OF MUMMIES
programme.desc: Unlock the mystery of mummification from ancient Egypt to present. Explore its fascination and quest for Queen Nefertiti's mummy. Where did 70 million ancient mummies disappear? Delve into Latin American mummy legends.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF ANCIENT CULTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries associated with ancient cultures including Lemuria, the Indus Valley civilization of Harappa, the Forgotten Kingdoms of Tibet, the Olmec civilization of Central America.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure
programme.desc: After submarine exploration of Grand Cayman Island, George dives with Canadian Armed Forces' experimental deep pressure unit. With explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuytten he investigates newly discovered "Black Smoker" deep sea vents.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane
programme.desc: Linking up with legendary storm chaser Jim Leonard, George flies to Jamaica to track Hurricane Dean. George then travels to Nova Scotia to experience the even bigger turmoil of Hurricane Noel at the iconic Maritime village of Peggy's Cove.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Island Caving
programme.desc: Accompanied by a group of hardcore cavers from Alberta and British Columbia, George descends into spectacular caves that lead deep into the earth on Vancouver Island. The team carries inflatable kayaks to explore a dark underground river.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: How to Colonize the Stars
programme.desc: Leading physicists and engineers in the field of interstellar travel discuss some of the deep issues we face when considering the problem of sending spacecraft to other stars. Will mankind ever truly become a space fairing civilization?

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Shepton Mallet
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores this 400-year-old prison.

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman: The Unstoppable Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: The Flying Scotsman has broken records and starred in movies.

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: The mighty Scotsman becomes stranded stateside.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: Boom, Bust and Blood
programme.desc: Chris Tarrant explores how railways transformed the nation.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: How the Railways Won the War
programme.desc: The crucial roles the railways played in the two world wars.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.desc: In the first of a four-parter, the amazing amphibians search for the segments of the powerful crystal Eye of Sarnoth. Shredder cuts the Turtles down to size, literally.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): It Came from Beneath the Sewers
programme.desc: In the second of a four-parter about the pursuit of the Eye of Sarnoth, the Turtles are attacked by a huge alien plant that is making New York into a jungle.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mean Machines
programme.desc: The hunt for the Eye of Sarnoth continues in the third of a four-parter with the Turtles in Groucho-like disguises. Shredder hooks up a fragment of the Eye to the computer Omnus.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Curse of the Evil Eye
programme.desc: Shredder is in control of the Eye of Sarnoth, enabling him to transmute matter. Shredder brings to life a dragon which soars through the air with shocked shellbacks Leonardo and Michelangelo aboard.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Case of the Killer Pizzas
programme.desc: The Turtles' favourite food, pizza, is also the source of their problem. Nasty, fanged creatures have been planted in pizza boxes! When the critters crack open their chrysalises, they become enormous.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Fly
programme.desc: Shredder sends April a rare duko plant that renders her unconscious. The Turtles seek a rare leaf that can serve as an antidote.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Punk Frogs
programme.desc: Mutagen, sent by Krang from Dimension X, changes four Florida frogs into half-human creatures four and a half feet tall. Shredder, training them in his evil ways, names them Attila the Frog, Genghis Frog, Rasputin the Mad Frog and Napoleon Bonafrog.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter No More
programme.desc: Michelangelo senses that their mentor is "mondo depressed" and Donatello finds a way of changing back Splinter the rat to Yoshi the man.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): New York's Shiniest
programme.desc: Shredder taps into New York's computers to steal plans for robots and creates an army of robots to destroy the Turtles and loot the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Neutrino teens Kala, Zak and Eask arrive on Earth and alert the Turtles to Shredder's latest plan to make "mindless zombies" of the Turtles.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a divorced mother is found murdered in her home, the police investigate and discover that she had rather an unusual array of people involved in her life.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Devoted mother Heather Strong disappears, leaving her estranged husband Josh to care for her two children, as he also falls under suspicion.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning. They play a dangerous game of give and take, hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a spate of murders in a small Louisiana community, detectives struggle to extract a confession from the main suspect until they invoke the memory of his deceased mother.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a college freshman goes missing without a trace, concerned friends and family talk to police about his last whereabouts. Those conversations, however, raise more questions than answers when they point to a potentially deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
